evals.prompt: Audit this Next.js marketing site before launch for titles, meta descriptions, canonical URLs, sitemap, robots.txt, structured data, and crawl/indexing risks.
evals.expected_output: Prioritizes crawlability, indexability, metadata, canonicals, sitemap, robots rules, structured data validation, rendered output, and launch monitoring with exact fixes.

evals.prompt: Improve this product page so it is clearer for Google AI Overviews and other answer engines without keyword stuffing or fake authority.
evals.expected_output: Treats GEO as search visibility plus answer usefulness, improves entity clarity, answer-ready structure, original evidence, supported claims, and warns against hacks like mass query pages or unsupported llms.txt requirements.

evals.prompt: We are migrating /docs routes to /guides. Review the redirect, canonical, sitemap, and Search Console risk before release.
evals.expected_output: Covers redirect map, canonical intent, sitemap updates, old URL preservation, crawl/indexing validation, monitoring, and rollback or post-launch checks.

evals.prompt: Make this app icon and landing page hero look less generic and fix the overlapping card on mobile.
evals.expected_output: Should not require seo-geo; design-engineer is a better fit unless search visibility or metadata is central.
